title: Translate a delivered glossary (domain/advocate reviewer)
context: A delivered researcher glossary (CC-BY-4.0, our own content) is translated into a target language with a domain/advocate reviewer. A researcher-glossary translation is riskTier medium; translating the patient glossary would be high and is out of scope here. The translation is licensed source-compatibly (CC-BY-4.0) and never relicenses any third-party source text.
objective: Translate a delivered researcher glossary into a target language with domain/advocate review, keeping provenance and a source-compatible license.
acceptanceCriteria: A delivered researcher glossary is translated into a named target language; only the researcher glossary (medium) is in scope - patient-facing translation would be riskTier high and is excluded here.
Translation reviewed by a domain or advocate reviewer fluent in the target language; meaning and provenance preserved per entry.
Output licensed source-compatibly (CC-BY-4.0, matching the source glossary); no third-party copyrighted source text is relicensed.
